overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a neon-lit covered pedestrian corridor, exiting into a dense futuristic urban canyon with massive digital billboards, then proceeding along sidewalks and under overpasses. The environment features high-rise buildings, holographic advertisements, and futuristic vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping corridor with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian corridor, passing food stalls and vending machines on either side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tan coat walking ahead in the same direction through the corridor

entered.detail: metal paneled ceiling with recessed square lighting fixtures spanning the walkway
row of illuminated food stalls with glass display cases and neon accent lighting
red and blue automated vending machines with glowing interface panels
large pink neon sign with Watson Whore text advertising media content
retro-style arcade cabinets with bright screens and colorful marquees

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered pedestrian corridor with a metal grate floor and paneled ceiling. Food service counters line the right side with neon lighting, while vending machines and arcade cabinets occupy the left. A large pink neon sign for Watson Whore hangs overhead. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves through the space in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit ramp transitioning from enclosed walkway to open city street

events.description: exits covered pedestrian corridor into open urban canyon with towering buildings and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking down the exit ramp toward the open street, emerging from the covered walkway into the urban environment

entered.detail: towering futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and massive digital facades
multi-lane urban road with futuristic vehicle traffic visible in the distance
giant illuminated advertisement screens covering the faces of buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete exit ramp, transitioning from the enclosed corridor to an open urban canyon. The covered ceiling gives way to a view of towering cyberpunk skyscrapers covered in digital billboards. The lighting shifts from artificial interior to mixed neon and ambient city light as the street level becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban commercial canyon with holographic advertisements and retail

events.description: crossing a busy intersection with yellow zebra crosswalk markings while futuristic vehicles wait at the traffic signal

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk through the neon-lit urban canyon, then crossing the street with other pedestrians at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal sedan driving along the street and stopping at the intersection for pedestrians

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with teal neon accents and multiple large advertisement screens
floating three-dimensional holographic displays projecting product images above the street
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt road surface
ground floor commercial spaces with illuminated signage and glass windows

segments.scene_description: The segment traverses a dense urban canyon surrounded by towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. A distinctive curved glass tower with teal lighting dominates the left side. The camera crosses a busy intersection with yellow crosswalk markings while futuristic vehicles navigate the streets. The environment is intensely lit with neon pink, blue, and teal colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass alongside busy traffic

events.description: enters covered underpass area beneath elevated highway with artificial lighting and heavy vehicle traffic

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass alongside heavy traffic, moving toward the distant light at the exit

entered.detail: dark concrete underside of elevated highway with linear fluorescent lighting fixtures
metal safety barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the busy traffic lanes
massive structural pillars supporting the overpass overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a covered underpass beneath an elevated highway. The environment is darker with artificial linear lighting and concrete support columns lining the left side. A metal guardrail separates the walkway from dense traffic flowing on the right. The camera walks toward a bright exit at the far end of the tunnel where the city continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit interior corridor out into a sprawling, high-tech urban canyon before descending into a shadowed underpass. It begins by moving through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with food counters, arcade cabinets, and a prominent pink neon sign. As the camera descends a concrete exit ramp, the enclosed ceiling vanishes to reveal a towering cityscape of skyscrapers and massive digital billboards under a shift toward ambient city light. The scene then expands into a dense urban canyon dominated by a curved teal glass tower and holographic advertisements, crossing a busy intersection filled with futuristic vehicles. Finally, the camera moves away from the vibrant open air and enters a darker concrete underpass beneath an elevated highway, walking past support columns and flowing traffic toward a bright exit.
